card.title: Derive content planning and experiments from verified analytics
card.summary: A governed cross-platform strategy, append-only experiment, deterministic weekly plan, existing-post review queue, supervised refresh cadence, and canonical brand-asset registry are implemented for owner review.
card.objective: Create a governed content system that turns verified post performance and creative taxonomy into testable experiments rather than unsupported advice.
acceptanceCriteria: Experiments reference normalized observations, comparison windows, and explicit hypotheses.
Results distinguish reach, relationship, authority, and conversion outcomes where the platforms expose evidence.
Creative labels use visible evidence or unknown and do not overwrite source metadata.
Planning outputs disclose coverage and sample-size limitations.
discoveries: The main TikTok is the mature reach funnel while the alternate account is a stronger fit for raw build-log, life, and community testing.

The alternate account's fashion, community, skate, and physique posts converted followers more efficiently per displayed view than its 15K reach outlier, supporting a portfolio of reach and relationship formats rather than a single viral template.
The alternate account's observed viewer and follower peaks support a bounded Saturday-evening versus Sunday-afternoon timing test, not a permanent schedule assumption.
Instagram's current reach sample favors physique-led Reels, while the small carousel sample warrants a second high-intent conversion test.
X evidence favors native builder context and qualified offers over bare cross-platform links.

LinkMe now uses a cleaner three-line brand bio, routes to the main TikTok, includes YouTube in the social row, hides its empty products section, presents the fitness app first, and ends with a verified branded `Watch Fawxzzy on YouTube` card; X and YouTube use the canonical Fawxzzy visual system, and the public YouTube avatar and banner now render after cache propagation.
The supervised Sunday analytics refresh and Monday plan-review series are active in Google Calendar with 60- and 10-minute popup reminders; the repository calendar remains the recovery copy.

The operator selected the pre-existing `@fawxzzy` YouTube channel as canonical and its exact channel ID, branding, description, LinkMe destination, watermark, and empty public state now pass Studio and public readback; the earlier `@Fawxzzyyy` analytics remain historical duplicate-channel evidence only.
LinkMe's YouTube social icon and branded featured card now both resolve to the canonical `https://www.youtube.com/@fawxzzy` destination after exact authenticated save and public readback.

A verified main-account TikTok session corrected the primary bio while preserving the native alternate-account reference and LinkMe field; the complete 7/28/60/365 matrix collected on 2026-07-14 remains current enough to retain without an immediate duplicate high-frequency collection.
The active Google Calendar week now contains seven private, transparent production cards derived from the verified weekly plan; no attendee, meeting link, or automatic publishing action was created.

APP-VIDEO-KIT-V1 defines a reusable Feature Reveal, Update Receipt, and Launch Trailer system with synthetic-data capture and platform derivatives; the first launch trailer is now public on main TikTok, canonical YouTube, and X with stable IDs recorded.
Future App Video Kit posts prefer a fitting platform-native or properly licensed audio track; synthesized original sound is now the explicit fallback rather than the default.

Publishable App Video Kit footage now requires immediate verification against the current production mobile UI and a dedicated professionally curated showcase account populated with sanitized operator-approved training data; stale regression fixtures are QA-only.
Priority is unresolved in the owner source and remains explicitly null.
nextActions: Collect a supervised YouTube Studio baseline for the canonical `@fawxzzy` channel; do not reuse the duplicate channel's 28-day observations.
At the next supervised weekly refresh, update the main TikTok 7/28/60/365 matrix from the verified main-account session without changing either handle or the existing LinkMe profile-link field.
Run the first supervised weekly refresh and review the generated plan.
Watch and classify every stable-ID item in the bounded review queue before recommending any visibility change.
Complete EXP-2026-07-20-001 with matched T+1, T+3, and T+7 observations.

Collect T+1, T+3, T+7, and T+28 observations for TikTok post 7662898974214475021, YouTube Short W63eMb9lVXc, and X post 2077541845911892081, then use matched-age evidence to select the next App Video Kit format.

Provision and curate the dedicated Fawxzzy production showcase account, seed only operator-approved sanitized training patterns, and prove production-version parity before the next publishable capture.
